description: Case do NHÓM tự viết thêm để cover thêm trường hợp. Mỗi case cần: id, phase='B', query HOẶC turns, failure_type (thuộc allowed_failure_types), và expect (tool_calls[...] hoặc no_tool=true). Nên kèm metadata.what_it_tests.

cases.query: Analyze the sentiment around OpenAI news this week.

metadata.what_it_tests: User explicitly asks for sentiment analysis around OpenAI news this week, so the agent should use news_sentiment instead of lookup.

cases.query: Give me a risk scan of VinFast news today.

metadata.what_it_tests: User asks for a risk scan, which requires sentiment and risk analysis, not ordinary news retrieval.

cases.query: Are robotics news articles this month mostly positive or negative?

metadata.what_it_tests: User asks whether recent news is positive or negative, so the agent should use the custom news_sentiment tool with timeframe=month.

cases.query: Tin tức AI hôm nay có gì?

metadata.what_it_tests: Plain news request should still use lookup, not news_sentiment. This checks that the new custom tool is not overused.

turns.content: Analyze the sentiment around OpenAI news this week.
Actually, do it for Anthropic instead.
Keep the timeframe as this week.

metadata.what_it_tests: Multi-turn correction: the agent should update the topic from OpenAI to Anthropic while carrying over timeframe=week.
